content.text:
[cron:f08d755d-68f7-4bfc-bac5-24f9cd5609f6 heartbeat] Check HEARTBEAT.md if it exists. Follow it strictly. Do not repeat old tasks. Reply HEARTBEAT_OK if nothing needs attention.
Current time: Wednesday, February 18th, 2026 — 1:22 PM (America/Porto_Velho)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
Checking HEARTBEAT.md for pending tasks.
- Pull Requests: Already marked as checked in HEARTBEAT.md, but I'll verify the current status of the listed PRs (#54, #53, #52, #51, #50) to see if any were merged or need a nudge.
- Forgotten Service: No active "Rastreador" alerts in the immediate workspace beyond what's in the PR list.
- Dispatching the Troop: All current PRs are from @franklinbaldo, indicating the automated agents have been active.

I will run `gh pr list` to see if there's any change since the last heartbeat update.
I also notice the HEARTBEAT.md has a "Checklist" where Pull Requests are marked [x] but then listed below as pending. I'll reconcile this.
